title: Component Validation Report
description: Structured output produced by the component validation agent for a single story file. Consumed by scripts/validate.js to determine pass/fail and generate human-readable reports.

component.description: Component name as declared in storyMeta.component, or derived from the story filename.

storyFile.description: Path to the story file that was validated, relative to the Storybook root.

validatedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when this validation ran.

overallStatus.description: pass: all checks clean. needs-review: checks pass but proposed items or unregistered component. fail: one or more checks failed.

proposed.description: All argTypes categorised as ⚠ Proposed — Needs Review. Always populated when present, even when overallStatus is pass.

argType.description: The prop key as it appears in argTypes.

description.description: The description field from the argType entry, explaining the proposed change.

action.description: The required human action before this prop can be promoted.

humanReviewRequired.description: True when any check has status fail or mismatch, proposed is non-empty, component is not registered, or any hardcoded value has no determinable token equivalent.

humanReviewReasons.description: Specific reasons why human review is required. Empty when humanReviewRequired is false.

status.description: pass: check clean. fail: violation found. skip: check not applicable. partial: present but incomplete. mismatch: present but inconsistent with manifest. not-registered: component absent from manifest.

findings.description: Specific, concrete findings. Each item is one finding — not a summary. Empty array when status is pass or skip.
